sections.sectionTitle: Salsuahna panin Pasian in Zion Khahkhia ding

verses.text: Zion aw, khanglo in; khanglo in la na tha khauhsak in. Khuapi siangtho Jerusalem aw, na puan hoihte silh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh dawibia mite leh a nin mite nang sungah hong pai nawnlo ding hi
A kimancip Jerusalem mite aw, leivui panin kisingkhia un la dingto un. A kiman Zion mite aw, na ngawng panun hong kihenna khaute sutkhia un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, “Man neiloin note hong kizuak a, sum pialoin note hong kitankhia ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Egypt gamah peemta dingin ka mite a masa-in pai uh a, tua banah thu omlopi-in Assiria in amaute nengniam uh hi
Tu-in Babylon-ah tua bangmahin amaute tungah piang leuleu hi. Thu omlopi-in salin om uh hi. Amau a ukte, kihihsakna tawh awng uh a, sunthapai-in keima min kisimmawh hi
Tua ahih ciangin ka mite in keima min hong thei ding uh a, thu a genpa pen keimah ka hihna tua ni ciangin amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Keimah, hih lai-ah ka om hi,” a ci hi
Thuhoih hong puak, kilemna thu a genzak, thuhoih thupha a hong puak, hotkhiatna thu a genzak, Zion tungah, “Na Pasian in uk hi,” ci-in mualte kantanin thu hong gen kamtaipa bangzahin hoih ahi hiam
Ngai un, na galvilte un a aw uh sangsak a, amaute in lungdamin la sa khawm uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Zion-ah Topa hong paikikna amaute in maitang kituahin a mu uh hi
A kisia Jerusalem munte aw, la sa-in kiko khawm un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama mite hehnemta a, Jerusalem honkhia khinta hi
Topa in minam khempeuh mai-ah a vangliatna siangtho zangin ama mite honkhia hi. Leitung mi khempeuh in i Pasian' hotkhiatna mu ding uh hi
Kihem un, kihem un. Babylon panin paikhia un la, a nin nate lawng kei un. Topa' beellekuang a puate aw, khuasung panin paikhia un la, nomau kisian'suah tawm un
Note' mai-ah Topa pai ding a, Israel Pasian pen note' nungah hong cingpa hi ding ahih manin note galtai-in paikhia loin, a kinawhsa-in na paikhia kei ding uh hi.
Topa in, “En un; ka nasempa a dau pai-in, amah a lianin kikoihin kilaamto ding a, sang mahmah ding hi
Mi tampite in amah lamdang sa uh hi. Mihing a bang nawnlo zah dongin nakpi takin a mai sia a, mihing a sun nawnlo zah dongin a mel a sia hi

Tua ahih ciangin amah in minam tampite dipkuasak ding a, ama hangin kumpite in a kam uh cih ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah a kigen ngeilo nate mu ding uh a, amaute in a zak ngeiloh uh nate theitel ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
